about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The journey behind the code
about.bio: I started my journey 5 years ago transforming ideas into digital reality.
about.journeyText: Our trajectory is defined by a relentless pursuit of engineering excellence. We architect robust, scalable systems that bridge the gap between abstract algorithmic theory and tangible business value.
about.philosophyText: We believe that true innovation operates invisibly. By leveraging advanced artificial intelligence and deterministic automation, we eliminate operational friction, allowing enterprises to scale with unprecedented efficiency.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Synergy
collaborative.description: Fostering deeply integrated partnerships to align technical execution with overarching strategic objectives.

detailOriented.title: Rigorous Precision
detailOriented.description: Applying uncompromising standards to every line of code, ensuring deterministic outcomes and zero-defect deployments.

transparent.title: Absolute Transparency
transparent.description: Maintaining an open, auditable flow of information throughout the entire software development lifecycle.

forwardThinking.title: Prospective Innovation
forwardThinking.description: Anticipating technological paradigm shifts to future-proof digital infrastructures against emerging challenges.

about.whyWorkWithMeSubtitle: A unique blend of skills that sets projects apart.
about.seoDescription: Learn more about our journey, philosophy, and the impact we create through digital craftsmanship.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I can do for you
services.comprehensiveSolutions: Comprehensive digital solutions for modern businesses.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: Crafting visually stunning and user-centric interfaces. I focus on aesthetic excellence paired with intuitive functionality to create digital experiences that captivate and convert.

development.title: Development
development.description: Turning designs into clean, efficient code using React, TypeScript, and modern animation libraries. Ensuring speed, SEO, and responsiveness.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Defining the core identity of your business. From logo design to comprehensive brand guidelines, I help build brands that resonate and endure.

services.heroSubtitle: A comprehensive suite of digital services designed to elevate your brand.
services.processDescription: A transparent and collaborative workflow designed to deliver exceptional results.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: Bringing designs to life with clean, robust, and scalable code. Specializing in modern React ecosystems, animation libraries, and performance-first architecture.

steps.discoveryDesc: We start by understanding your business goals, target audience, and unique value proposition. This foundation ensures the design aligns with your vision.
steps.strategyDesc: Developing a roadmap and digital strategy to ensure project success. We define the user journey and key performance indicators.
steps.designDesc: Crafting pixel-perfect, user-centric interfaces that engage and convert. We focus on modern aesthetics and intuitive usability.
steps.developmentDesc: Turning designs into clean, efficient code using React, TypeScript, and modern animation libraries. Ensuring speed, SEO, and responsiveness.
steps.launchDesc: Deployment, testing, and final optimization. I provide documentation and support to help you manage and grow your new digital asset.

saas.title: Custom SaaS Development
saas.description: I build custom, scalable B2B platforms. From management systems and CRMs to marketplaces with robust infrastructure.

agents.title: AI Agents (24/7 Support)
agents.description: I deploy artificial intelligence agents that assist via WhatsApp and Web. They qualify leads, schedule appointments, and reduce manual workload.

booking.title: Websites + Bookings
booking.description: I design premium websites integrated with booking engines and synchronized calendars. High-end interface and zero friction.

services.aiDescription: Transforming enterprise operations through state-of-the-art cognitive frameworks and hyper-automation architectures.

problems.title: Systemic Inefficiencies
problems.manualDesc: Redundant manual labor stealing vital hours from your team.
problems.contractDesc: Use of improvised documents and contracts that expose your business.
problems.supportDesc: Severe bottlenecks in client onboarding or support.

results.title: Engineered Outcomes
results.invisibleDesc: Invisible workflows operating 24/7 with zero human intervention.
results.cognitiveDesc: Cognitive infrastructure (AI Agents) integrated with your own data.
results.scalingDesc: Ability to scale client volume without multiplying operational costs.

services.roiAuditSubtitle: Discover the direct financial impact of eliminating per-task fees and automating workflows.

pricing.title: Development & Automation Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the integration tier your business needs. No per-task fees and scalable AI infrastructure.

esencial.title: Essential Plan
esencial.description: Ideal for professionals and SMEs looking to establish a premium digital presence and capture leads.
features: Optimized UX and local SEO (Google Maps)
com domain & hosting for the 1st year

profesional.title: Professional Plan
profesional.description: Complete setup to automate sales, leads, and seamlessly sync with your CRM.

corporativo.title: Corporate Plan
corporativo.description: For enterprises needing bespoke software and deep automation integrations.
features: Multi-agent swarms & AI with RAG (Vector DB)
Deep integration of custom ERPs & APIs

impact.subtitle: Systems in production delivering measurable returns.

case1.title: Clinic (Healthcare)
case1.problem: Problem: Team collapsed replying to leads (+42 hour delays).
case1.solution: Solution: WhatsApp AI Agent deployment with calendar syncing.
case1.result: Result: Response time cut to 2 minutes, +34% automated bookings, and 14 weekly hours freed for medical staff.

case2.title: Real Estate Network
case2.problem: Problem: 80% of portal leads unqualified, wasting 12h/day of brokers' time.
case2.solution: Solution: AI Pre-screening system & deep CRM integration.
case2.result: Result: Lead qualification in 3 minutes (61% qualification rate). Team filtering efficiency improved from 8h to 2h daily.

case3.title: Marketing Agency (B2B)
case3.problem: Problem: Needed to scale services without hiring expensive developers.
case3.solution: Solution: White-label SaaS development for automated client provisioning.
case3.result: Result: 12 clients launched in 30 days with 24/7 lead capture. ROI achieved in less than 3 months.
